descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: Average linear dimension of crystalline grains
descriptors.rationale: Controls mechanical strength via Hall-Petch relation

quality.loss_reason: Averaging collapses distribution to single value
quality.notes: Mean obscures bimodal or skewed distributions

descriptors.name: grain size distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: Statistical spread of grain size population
descriptors.rationale: Quantifies microstructural heterogeneity affecting property scatter

quality.loss_reason: Single dispersion metric loses distribution shape
quality.notes: Same variance fits infinite distinct distributions

descriptors.name: grain aspect ratio
descriptors.physical_meaning: Shape elongation of grains from equiaxed
descriptors.rationale: Indicates anisotropic deformation or directional growth

quality.truncation_error: Spatial texture and individual morphologies lost
quality.notes: Identical average from different shape populations

descriptors.name: texture intensity
descriptors.rationale: Quantifies anisotropy in mechanical and physical properties

quality.loss_reason: Scalar cannot encode orientation distribution details
quality.truncation_error: All directional and component information lost
quality.notes: Many distinct textures yield identical intensity

descriptors.name: grain boundary energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: Thermodynamic excess energy at grain interfaces
descriptors.rationale: Drives grain growth and boundary migration

quality.notes: Different boundary populations yield same average

descriptors.name: twin boundary fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: Proportion of special low-energy twin interfaces
descriptors.rationale: Affects deformation mechanisms and boundary mobility

representation.encoding: real number between zero and one
representation.notes: Ratio of twin to total boundaries

quality.notes: Well-defined ratio with clear physical meaning

descriptors.name: high angle boundary fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: Proportion of boundaries above misorientation threshold

representation.encoding: real number between zero and one

quality.loss_reason: Binary threshold discards continuous misorientation information
quality.truncation_error: Exact misorientation angles within classes lost
quality.notes: Threshold choice affects measured value arbitrarily

descriptors.name: grain boundary density
descriptors.physical_meaning: Total interfacial area per unit volume
descriptors.rationale: Correlates with diffusion pathways and strength

quality.loss_reason: Total area loses spatial distribution information
quality.notes: Same density from different grain arrangements

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: Line length of crystal defects per volume
descriptors.rationale: Quantifies strain hardening and stored energy

quality.loss_reason: Total density loses character and arrangement
quality.truncation_error: Dislocation type, orientation, spatial distribution lost

descriptors.name: grain boundary character distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: Population statistics over misorientation angle space
descriptors.rationale: Captures full boundary type distribution for properties

quality.loss_reason: Discretization and binning lose exact values
quality.truncation_error: Continuous angles rounded to bin centers
quality.notes: Information preserved with sufficient bin resolution

descriptors.name: grain boundary plane distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: Population of boundary interface plane orientations
descriptors.rationale: Plane orientation affects energy and mobility

representation.notes: Binned stereographic projection or spherical harmonics

quality.loss_reason: Discretization or truncation of harmonic expansion
quality.truncation_error: High frequency variations smoothed or binned
quality.notes: Resolution depends on bin count choice

descriptors.name: local strain heterogeneity
descriptors.physical_meaning: Spatial variation in plastic deformation field
descriptors.rationale: Indicates crack nucleation sites and hardening

representation.notes: Standard deviation or coefficient of variation

quality.loss_reason: Dispersion metric loses spatial correlation structure
quality.truncation_error: Strain field morphology and localization lost
quality.notes: Different patterns yield identical dispersion values

descriptors.name: triple junction density
descriptors.physical_meaning: Number of grain edge intersections per volume
descriptors.rationale: Affects kinetics of grain growth processes

quality.loss_reason: Count loses junction type and topology
quality.truncation_error: Junction angles and connectivity information lost
quality.notes: Different networks yield same junction density

descriptors.name: stored energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: Excess internal energy from crystal defects
descriptors.rationale: Driving force for recrystallization and recovery

quality.truncation_error: Defect type contributions and locations lost
quality.notes: Different defect configurations yield same total

descriptors.name: grain topology
descriptors.physical_meaning: Average connectivity of grain network structure
descriptors.rationale: Relates to stability and growth kinetics

representation.notes: Average faces or neighbors per grain

quality.loss_reason: Average loses distribution and spatial arrangement
quality.truncation_error: Individual grain connectivity and network structure lost
quality.notes: Topologically distinct networks yield same average

descriptors.name: grain boundary mobility
descriptors.physical_meaning: Velocity response to thermodynamic driving force
descriptors.rationale: Controls grain growth and recrystallization kinetics

quality.loss_reason: Single value averages over boundary character
quality.notes: Different boundary populations yield same average

descriptors.name: precipitate volume fraction
descriptors.physical_meaning: Volumetric proportion of secondary phase particles
descriptors.rationale: Controls strengthening and grain boundary pinning

representation.encoding: real number between zero and one

quality.loss_reason: Volume fraction loses size distribution information
quality.notes: Different size distributions yield same fraction

descriptors.name: interface coherency
descriptors.physical_meaning: Atomic registry match at phase boundaries

quality.loss_reason: Continuous coherency spectrum discretized to classes
quality.truncation_error: Gradations within categories and strain details lost

quality.loss_reason: Mean loses distribution and spatial structure
quality.notes: Different cell populations yield same average
